'''kajulu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iatrophysics|iatrophysics]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-j-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iatrophysics|iatrophysics]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| kajulu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæjilith|kæjilith]] || [[word:kæjilij|kæjilij]] || [[word:kæjilish|kæjilish]] || [[word:kæjili|kæjili]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kajujuluth|kajujuluth]] || [[word:kajujuluj|kajujuluj]] || [[word:kajujulush|kajujulush]] || [[word:kajujulu|kajujulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kajuluth|kajuluth]] || [[word:kajuluj|kajuluj]] || [[word:kajulush|kajulush]] || [[word:kajulu|kajulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kajuflufth|kajuflufth]] || [[word:kajuflufj|kajuflufj]] || [[word:kajuflufsh|kajuflufsh]] || [[word:kajufluf|kajufluf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kajuluthu|kajuluthu]] || [[word:kajuluju|kajuluju]] || [[word:kajulushu|kajulushu]] || [[word:kajuluku|kajuluku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kajuluth|kajuluth]] || [[word:kajuluj|kajuluj]] || [[word:kajulush|kajulush]] || [[word:kajulu|kajulu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kajuluthul|kajuluthul]] || [[word:kajulujul|kajulujul]] || [[word:kajulushul|kajulushul]] || [[word:kajulukul|kajulukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kajuluuthuthu|kajuluuthuthu]] || [[word:kajuluujuju|kajuluujuju]] || [[word:kajuluushushu|kajuluushushu]] || [[word:kajuluuku|kajuluuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kajuluthun|kajuluthun]] || [[word:kajulujun|kajulujun]] || [[word:kajulushun|kajulushun]] || [[word:kajulukun|kajulukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kajuluthuoro|kajuluthuoro]] || [[word:kajulujuoro|kajulujuoro]] || [[word:kajulushuoro|kajulushuoro]] || [[word:kajulukuoro|kajulukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d5728ff}}
